qa_pairs.question: How can users run graphical programs interactively on a compute node?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can run graphical programs interactively on a compute node by adding the `--x11` flag to their `salloc` command. It is also necessary to connect to the cluster with X11 forwarding enabled beforehand.

qa_pairs.question: What impact does the duration of an interactive job have on its start time on the cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: Interactive jobs requesting a duration of three hours or less are likely to start very soon after submission because they run on dedicated test nodes. However, interactive jobs requesting more than three hours run on the cluster's regular set of nodes and may experience longer wait times, potentially hours or even days, with unpredictable start times.
